string.key: Adjust the spacing between menu bar icons

MenuBarSpacing.string: Adjust the spacing between menu bar icons

string.key: Log out to apply spacing changes?

MenuBarSpacing.string: Log out to apply spacing changes?

string.key: Save your work in all apps before rebooting.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Save your work in all apps before rebooting.

string.key: Save your work in all apps before logging out.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Save your work in all apps before logging out.

string.key: Menu bar spacing changes require a reboot or logout to take effect. This is a macOS limitation.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Menu bar spacing changes require a reboot or logout to take effect. This is a macOS limitation.

string.key: Settings saved. Reboot or log out to apply.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Settings saved. Reboot or log out to apply.

string.key: Visit the GitHub repository to file issues, request features, and follow development.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Visit the GitHub repository to file issues, request features, and follow development.

string.key: Choose the display language for Menu Bar Spacing. The app will restart to apply the change.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Choose the display language for Menu Bar Spacing. The app will restart to apply the change.

string.key: Menu Bar Spacing needs to restart to apply the new language.

MenuBarSpacing.string: Menu Bar Spacing needs to restart to apply the new language.
